sql.header: SELECT o.c_order_id, o.documentno, o.dateordered, o.validuntil, dt.name AS doc_type, bp.name AS bp_name, bpl.name AS bp_location, o.description, o.grandtotal, o.totallines, pt.name AS payment_term, pm.name AS payment_method, cur.iso_code AS currency, CASE o.docstatus WHEN 'CO' THEN 'Complete' WHEN 'DR' THEN 'Draft' WHEN 'VO' THEN 'Void' ELSE o.docstatus END AS status, org.name AS org_name, orgi.taxid AS org_taxid, orgl.address1 AS org_address, orgl.postal AS org_postal, orgl.city AS org_city FROM c_order o JOIN c_bpartner bp ON bp.c_bpartner_id = o.c_bpartner_id JOIN c_bpartner_location bpl ON bpl.c_bpartner_location_id = o.c_bpartner_location_id LEFT JOIN c_doctype dt ON dt.c_doctype_id = o.c_doctypetarget_id LEFT JOIN c_paymentterm pt ON pt.c_paymentterm_id = o.c_paymentterm_id LEFT JOIN fin_paymentmethod pm ON pm.fin_paymentmethod_id = o.fin_paymentmethod_id LEFT JOIN c_currency cur ON cur.c_currency_id = o.c_currency_id JOIN ad_org org ON org.ad_org_id = o.ad_org_id LEFT JOIN ad_orginfo orgi ON orgi.ad_org_id = o.ad_org_id LEFT JOIN c_location orgl ON orgl.c_location_id = orgi.c_location_id WHERE o.c_order_id = '__DOCUMENTID__'
sql.lines: SELECT ol.line, COALESCE(p.name, ol.description) AS product_name, ol.qtyordered AS quantity, uom.name AS uom, ol.priceactual, ol.linenetamt FROM c_orderline ol LEFT JOIN m_product p ON p.m_product_id = ol.m_product_id LEFT JOIN c_uom uom ON uom.c_uom_id = ol.c_uom_id WHERE ol.c_order_id = '__DOCUMENTID__' ORDER BY ol.line
sql.taxes: SELECT t.name AS tax_name, ot.taxbaseamt, ot.taxamt FROM c_ordertax ot JOIN c_tax t ON t.c_tax_id = ot.c_tax_id WHERE ot.c_order_id = '__DOCUMENTID__' ORDER BY t.name
